gallery.heroDesc: Every smile we create is a balance of medical precision and artistic vision. Explore our documented transformations and state-of-the-art facilities.

whatsapp.title: FeRa Clinic
whatsapp.greeting: Hi there! 👋 Welcome to FeRa Clinic. How can we help you today?

chat.welcomeMsg: Hi there! 👋 We're so glad you're here. How can we support your smile journey today?
chat.formSuccess: Thank you! Our medical team will contact you shortly.
chat.faqQ1: Do you offer hotel and transfer?
chat.faqA1: Yes, we provide VIP airport transfers and 5-star hotel coordination for all our international patients to ensure a stress-free journey.
chat.faqQ2: How long does Hollywood Smile take?
chat.faqA2: A Hollywood Smile transformation typically takes 5 to 7 days in Istanbul, involving 2-3 clinical visits for artisanal design and placement.
chat.faqA3: Yes, initial clinical consultations and 3D treatment planning are completely free of charge at FeRa Clinic.
chat.faqA4: Costs are personalized. However, patients typically save up to 70% compared to Western prices while receiving premium Swiss-engineered materials.

hero.heroTitle: A Smile You Can Trust. A Confidence You Can Feel.
hero.heroDesc: At FeRa Clinic, we combine clinical precision with artistic design to create natural, lasting smiles — tailored to you, guided by specialists, and delivered with care.
hero.trustLine: ISO Certified • 15+ Specialist Dentists • Global Patient Hub

about.title: About FeRa Clinic
about.subtitle: We are The Smile Makers - a premier dental clinic in Istanbul dedicated to transforming lives through exceptional dental care and personalized treatment experiences.
about.story: Founded in 2009, FeRa Clinic began with a simple mission: to provide world-class dental care that combines Turkish hospitality with international medical standards. Our name 'FeRa' represents the perfect balance between precision and artistry in dentistry.
about.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Our commitment to excellence has earned us recognition as a leading dental clinic in Turkey
about.teamSubtitle: Internationally trained specialists dedicated to creating your perfect smile
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at FeRa Clinic
about.heroTitle: Expert Dental Care in Nişantaşı, Istanbul
about.heroDesc: FeRa Clinic combines international surgical precision with boutique patient care. Our protocols are designed for long-term clinical excellence.
about.pillarsDesc: Our clinic operates under strict international medical protocols, ensuring that every patient receives restorative and aesthetic care of the highest biological standard.

pillars.riskDesc: We follow stringent global safety standards for all invasive procedures.
pillars.techDesc: Implementing the latest 3D imaging for extreme surgical accuracy.
pillars.triageDesc: Multi-disciplinary coordination for complex restorative cases.
pillars.careDesc: Dedicated coordinators supporting your entire medical journey.

about.boutiqueHub: Istanbul's Boutique Hub for Surgical Excellence
about.teamDesc: Our surgical team consists of credentialed specialists with over 15 years of evidence-based clinical experience.
about.ctaDesc: Connect with our clinical coordinators for a specialized cost estimate and trip protocol.

home.heroDesc: Redefining the standard of biological dentistry through the marriage of clinical precision and patient-centered luxury.
home.precisionDesc: At FeRa Clinic, we combine surgical mastery with a deep understanding of your personal journey. Every protocol is designed around your comfort and long-term well-being.

technology.title: Clinical Technology
technology.subtitle: Advanced Diagnostics for Surgical Precision
technology.desc: We invest in the latest medical technology to ensure predictable, long-term outcomes for every patient visit.
technology.t1Desc: High-resolution digital scans for extreme surgical accuracy in implant placement.
technology.t2Desc: Simulate your final result before treatment begins with advanced facial mapping.
technology.t3Desc: Minimally invasive soft tissue procedures with faster healing and zero discomfort.

sterilization.title: ISO-Standard Sterilization
sterilization.desc: Hospital-grade Class-B sterilization protocols in every surgical suite for total patient safety.

planning.title: Predictable Planning
planning.desc: Full digital planning including diagnostic wax-ups to ensure functional and aesthetic harmony.

doctors.title: Specialist Surgeons
doctors.desc: Our team consists exclusively of specialists with advanced clinical training in their respective fields.

coordination.title: VIP Coordination
coordination.desc: A dedicated international patient manager handles your travel, hotel, and clinical schedule.

home.beforeAfterDesc: Every smile we create is a balance of medical precision and artistic vision. Hover to see the transformation.
home.stateOfArtDesc: Strategically located in Nişantaşı, our clinic is a boutique medical hub designed for international patients seeking high-precision restorative and aesthetic dentistry.
home.completeCareDesc: We handle every detail of your visit — from the airport to your hotel and clinical care — so you can focus entirely on your new smile and well-deserved recovery.
home.planYourVisitDesc: Our surgical coordinators are available to review your case and provide a detailed clinical protocol and cost estimate within 24 hours.
home.realOutcomes: Documented transformations from patients who traveled globally to trust FeRa Clinic with their care.
home.readyToGetStartedDesc: We're here to help you take the first step. Connect with our caring team for a personal consultation and treatment roadmap.
home.whatsappTooltip: Direct priority access to our clinical coordinators.

0.desc: Swiss-engineered titanium implants with 3D guided surgery and a lifetime clinical warranty.

1.desc: Artisanal E-Max porcelain veneers designed for natural translucency and facial harmony.

2.desc: Immediate full-arch rehabilitation for total tooth loss using the proven All-on-4 protocol.

testimonials.t1: The level of medical professionalism was beyond what I expected. The 3D planning phase made me feel completely at ease with my implant surgery.
testimonials.t2: Seamless coordination from the airport to the clinic. My Hollywood Smile was completed in 6 days with extreme attention to detail.
testimonials.t3: A truly boutique experience in Nişantaşı. The surgeons are incredibly skilled and the results are perfectly natural.

newsletter.title: Stay Informed
newsletter.subtitle: Stay connected with us. Receive curated smile tips, treatment stories, and exclusive clinic updates from our home in Nişantaşı.
newsletter.success: Thank you for subscribing! Check your email for confirmation.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

treatments.heroDesc: Specialist-led care across all restorative and aesthetic dental disciplines. We combine medical precision with the latest digital technology for lasting results.
treatments.title: Clinical Disciplines
treatments.subtitle: Specialist-led care across all restorative and aesthetic dental disciplines

1.title: Dental Implants
1.desc: Permanent tooth replacement using high-precision surgical guides and premium titanium.

2.title: Hollywood Smile
2.desc: Artisanal porcelain veneers crafted to optimize color, alignment, and facial symmetry.

3.title: Orthodontics
3.desc: Discreet alignment solutions including clear aligners for healthy, functional results.

4.title: Professional Whitening
4.desc: Clinical-grade LED whitening systems for safe, effective, and long-lasting results.

5.title: Full Smile Design
5.desc: Comprehensive multi-disciplinary rehabilitation of the entire smile.

6.title: All-on-4 Restoration
6.desc: Immediate full-arch replacement for complete tooth loss with just four implants.

7.title: Zirconium Crowns
7.desc: High-durability aesthetic crowns that mimic the light reflection of natural enamel.

8.title: Gingival Sculpting
8.desc: Laser-precise gum contouring to achieve the perfect balance in your smile line.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Advanced implant solutions designed for biological longevity and natural aesthetics.

hollywood.title: Hollywood Smile
hollywood.desc: Precision-crafted veneers designed to harmonize with your unique facial features.

ortho.title: Orthodontics
ortho.desc: Modern alignment protocols for a healthy, functional, and aesthetic bite.

treatments.transformDesc: Experience boutique patient care paired with international surgical standards in Nişantaşı.
treatments.saveNotice: Premium clinical care at localized Istanbul rates — save up to 70% vs. UK/US clinics.

tourism.coordDesc: From initial digital triage to post-operative recovery, our concierge team handles every surgical and logistical detail.
tourism.costDesc: Istanbul offers high-precision clinical care with operational efficiency. We utilize the same premium materials and technology as leading EU clinics at localized rates.
